title: Dekton 9 in 1 Precision Screwdriver Set - Bit Storage in Pen Handle| Knurled Finish for Better Grip | Magnetic Bit Holder | Pocket Clip | Ideal for Repairing Glasses, Electronics and Many Other Items
features: 9 In 1 Versatility: The Dekton 9 In 1 Precision Screwdriver Set features a multi-bit design that includes nine interchangeable bits, providing a versatile solution for a wide range of tasks. This compact set is ideal for working on electronics, glasses, and other delicate items, offering the right tool for various screw types and sizes.

Bit Storage in Pen Handle: Designed for convenience, this screwdriver set integrates bit storage within the handle. The bits are neatly stored inside the pen-shaped handle, allowing for easy access and organization. This innovative design ensures that you always have the necessary bits on hand, reducing clutter and preventing loss.

Knurled Finish for Better Grip: The handle of the Dekton Precision Screwdriver Set features a knurled finish that provides a secure and comfortable grip. The textured surface enhances control and prevents slipping, even during precision tasks or extended use. This ergonomic design ensures that you can work with confidence and precision.

Magnetic Bit Holder: Equipped with a magnetic bit holder, this screwdriver set allows for quick and easy bit changes. The magnetic feature keeps bits securely in place while you work, preventing them from falling or becoming misplaced. This ensures a smooth and efficient workflow, enhancing your overall productivity.

Pocket Clip for Portability: The integrated pocket clip adds convenience, allowing you to carry the screwdriver set easily and securely. Clip it to your pocket, tool belt, or bag for quick access on the go. This feature is especially useful for professionals who need to keep their tools readily available during their work.
description: From the manufacturer DEKTON products offer great value for money whilst incorporating useful features which improve performance and user experience Where applicable, our products comply with the latest British and European regulations All DEKTON products are manufactured to high quality standards that undergo excellent quality control through our partners worldwide Ideal for repairing Glasses, electronics and many other items. An essential part of your toolkit. Suitable for general purpose, workshop, automotive, crafts and hobbies. DEKTON 9 in 1 Precision Screwdriver Set
